blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 947 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
